machine_readout_not_section7_adjudicatio.declared_risk: RB episode-level revision rate .673 exceeds the pi grid support [.02,.30]; scale mismatch is expected and is not a retraining trigger.

nonformal_observations.detail: A preflight GET /v1/models against the proxy returned 404 because the proxy exposes POST chat completions only; vLLM /health and proxy /docs were healthy, and no formal provider had started.
Python resource_tracker warned about leaked semaphore/shared-memory handles during vLLM shutdown; ports closed and GPU memory was fully released before replay.
